Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by quickly identifying the version of the game.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are converted to strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances the speed of displaying time-related information in games.
